# kCVImageBufferDisplayWidthKey

**Global Variable**

A key to the display width of the image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferDisplayWidthKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The display width value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferDisplayHeightKey**: A key to the display height of the image buffer.
